observed_failure.cause_boundary: The worker drain process exited zero after a tick completed zero while retained jobs remained delayed or requeued. The failed-attempt adapter did not archive the captured worker stderr, so the underlying first job error requires a separate no-generation diagnostic.

external_dispatch_audit.conclusion: No reader, judge, or Deep generation was accepted or billed. Both rows stopped during deterministic memory construction or worker drain before recall and the controlled generation proxies were never invoked.
